AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description:
MyMovie provides functions for discovering movies from TMDB (The Movie Database).
Operational Patterns: - Call searchMovies or getTopRatedMovies first to obtain valid movieId values. - Use the returned movieId with getMovieDetails to retrieve full details for a specific title. - Use the returned movieId with getSimilarMovies to explore related titles. - Increment the page parameter to paginate through large result sets; pages start at 1.
Constraints: - movieId values are TMDB identifiers valid only within this app's functions. - All functions require network access; results depend on TMDB API availability.
